description: Three researcher agents each write a finding to a unique top-level key (analysis-by-popularity / analysis-by-activity / analysis-by-adoption) on their own branch, then merge to main.
summary: All 3 disjoint keys present on main: ['analysis-by-activity', 'analysis-by-adoption', 'analysis-by-popularity']. Missing: none. Attribution intact: True.
claim: Disjoint top-level keys are unioned cleanly by the 3-way merge engine; all 3 writers' contributions are preserved on main.
